title: Allow comments on jira to sync to Monday Item Updates
excerpt: Currently have a Jira to Monday integration, P&E team uses Jira for management, Project management uses Monday for higher level. Would like to have comments on monday be able to be tied to item updates so there is less j…

posts.author: lorirosario (Lori)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently have a Jira to Monday integration, P&E team uses Jira for management, Project management uses Monday for higher level. Would like to have comments on monday be able to be tied to item updates so there is less jumping around for both teams.

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml:
Lori, we are an automation agency and we’ve built something like this for a client.

Let me know if you’d like to chat.
